misc.text: #ONEPIECE I also wouldn't mind if Oda uses Sigurd, The Dragon Slayer of Norse Mythology, as Zoro's Opponent in Elbalf. Sigurd would have his famed blade, Gram & he'd probably be the Strongest Swordsman of Elbalf. Zoro would definitely challenge him. 🤔 (Wishful thinking tho) MistaZod 👑👾 | PATIENCE | Mr. Zodiac | (@MistaZod) #ONEPIECE Elbalf Matchups I hope come True Luffy vs Thor(God of Thunder/Possible Prince Loki Enemy(Arc Prince)) Ussop vs Goliath(Slingshot David vs Giant Biblical Story) Zoro vs Fafnir(Sigurd with his cursed sword Gram vs Fafnir, The Dragon. Western Dragon Zoan User?) — https://nitter.net/MistaZod/status/1818139695827611825#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I also fear for Gaban’s life; he bears all the signs of death flags...😭

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies i
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies it could be a Black Blade like the ones Mihawk or Ryuma wielded, right?

misc.title: Happy 75th Dad! Today I'm remembering your weirdness and your extraordinary capacity to love. And for the folks out there who'd like to celebrate with me, go do something kind for someone. Make someon
misc.text: Happy 75th Dad! Today I'm remembering your weirdness and your extraordinary capacity to love. And for the folks out there who'd like to celebrate with me, go do something kind for someone. Make someone laugh. Put a little more good into the world. Love you forever.

misc.title: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an av
misc.text: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an average temperature of 29.8°C Around 40 people are confirmed to have drowned while swimming in efforts to cool down. (theguardian.com/world/2026/j…) Community note: The 29.8°C is France's national average of day and night temperatures across 30 weather stations; local highs reached 44.3°C. The 40 drownings occurred over the past week during the heatwave. apnews.com/article/heat-w… bbc.com/news/articles/… — https://nitter.net/PopBase/status/2069754874074398969#m

items.text: Happy 75th Dad! Today I'm remembering your weirdness and your extraordinary capacity to love. And for the folks out there who'd like to celebrate with me, go do something kind for someone. Make someone laugh. Put a little more good into the world. Love you forever.
